## Summary

<!-- Describe the changes and WHY they are being made -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional change)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the architecture conventions in `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] I have run `flutter analyze` with zero warnings
- [ ] I have run `flutter test` and all tests pass
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] All public APIs have dartdoc comments
- [ ] I have NOT used `print()` — only `ShopifyLogger`

Closes #
